frame_analyses.description: Wide shot of FLS training facility with multiple trainer stations. Second frame shows close-up of peg transfer trainer board with colored pegs (tan, pink, green) on left side and black pegs on right side, with empty spaces in center columns. This is clearly an instructional/educational video showing the apparatus.
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Standard FLS peg transfer trainer configuration visible

frame_analyses.description: Matthew Weaks, Simulation Technologist at Eastern Virginia Medical School, introduced on screen with title card. Background shows FLS training facility. This is clearly an expert demonstrator presenting educational content.
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Professional educational setting; instructor introduction phase

frame_analyses.description: Instructor (older male, white coat with EVMS logo) and trainee (female) shown at FLS station. Instructor is holding the endoloop ligating loop apparatus and demonstrating proper handling technique with the trainee.
frame_analyses.technique_notes: One-on-one instruction; apparatus shown is endoloop/ligating loop, NOT peg transfer

frame_analyses.description: Close-up of hands demonstrating endoloop apparatus with foam appendage and pre-tied ligating loop. Red marker visible on appendage indicating target placement line. Instructor guiding trainee through loop deployment technique.
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Close-up demonstrates proper loop placement and cinching technique; this is TASK 3 (Endoloop), not Task 1

frame_analyses.description: Screen shows peg transfer trainer from laparoscopic camera view (monitor display). Multiple pegs visible: colored pegs on left (tan, pink, green), black pegs on right, empty center columns. This shows the camera view trainees see during the task.
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Laparoscopic camera perspective of peg transfer trainer; showing apparatus setup

frame_analyses.description: Same laparoscopic view of peg transfer trainer showing full board configuration with all pegs in starting positions.
Matthew Weaks back on camera speaking to viewer. Appears to be concluding remarks or summary of training content presented.
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Instructional video conclusion; presenter summarizing key points

classification_rationale: This is clearly an INSTRUCTIONAL video, not a performance video. It features Matthew Weaks, a Simulation Technologist, introducing and demonstrating FLS training apparatus to trainees at Eastern Virginia Medical School. The video includes: (1) facility overview, (2) expert introduction and narration, (3) hands-on demonstration of endoloop technique with a trainee, and (4) laparoscopic camera views of peg transfer trainer. There is no actual timed performance being conducted — this is educational/tutorial content with demonstration and likely narration explaining proper technique.
scoring_determination: NOT APPLICABLE — This is instructional content. Per scoring guidelines, instructional videos with educational narration, expert demonstrations, and facility/apparatus overviews are classified as instructional and should NOT be scored as performance. Teaching content extraction applies instead.

demonstrated_techniques: Proper endoloop apparatus handling and patient positioning
Target line identification on foam appendage
Peg transfer trainer setup and laparoscopic camera orientation
verbal_cues: Expert introduction by Matthew Weaks, Simulation Technologist
Facility and apparatus overview provided to orient trainees
common_errors_addressed: Proper loop placement at marked target line (demonstrated correct positioning)
Secure cinching of loop to ensure appendage is properly ligated
teaching_content.facility_context: Eastern Virginia Medical School FLS training lab with multiple trainer stations
instructional_objectives: Introduce FLS apparatus and proper setup
Demonstrate correct endoloop deployment and cinching
Show laparoscopic camera perspective for trainee understanding
Provide one-on-one guidance for skill acquisition

note: This video serves an educational/training purpose showing expert demonstration of FLS techniques. It is not a timed performance evaluation and therefore receives no FLS score. Instead, the content is analyzed for teaching value and technique demonstration.
confidence_rationale: Clear instructional context with expert introduction, facility overview, one-on-one demonstration, and educational setting. Title cards identify the presenter and institution. No timer visible, no performance pressure, setup is for demonstration purposes only.
